texto: There is a fearful moment of reckoning before us should it ever chance that when all our trees shall have been sacrificed on the altar of the patron-fiend of news, the newspaper supply shall suddenly be cut off and we find ourselves some fine morning minus our tidbits of shame and failure and disaster, left to the companionship of our own thoughts. Dante never imagined a terror like this.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Adeline Knapp: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “There is a fearful moment of reckoning before us should it ever chance that when all our trees sh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, newspapers, trees pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e termino.
